infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MedRoute uses your camera to scan medication barcodes and photograph delivery manifests.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MedRoute uses your location to track deliveries and confirm delivery addresses.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: MedRoute uses your location in the background to track delivery routes.

plugins.photosPermission: MedRoute needs access to your photos to upload delivery manifests.
plugins.cameraPermission: MedRoute needs camera access to scan barcodes and photograph manifests.
